info.name: Akeyless Secrets Management
info.description:
Integrate Akeyless secrets management platform with TeamCity. Retrieve secrets from Akeyless during builds without storing sensitive data in TeamCity.
Features: - Secure secret retrieval from Akeyless - Support for multiple authentication methods (Access Key, Kubernetes, AWS IAM, Azure AD, GCP, Certificate) - Remote parameters support - Automatic token management - Support for static secrets, dynamic secrets, and rotated secrets

teamcity-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0
  • Initial release
  • Support for static, dynamic, and rotated secrets
  • Authentication methods: Access Key, Kubernetes, AWS IAM, Azure AD, GCP, Certificate
  • Remote parameter support with akeyless: prefix
  • OAuth-based connection management
